Google Play Store Reviews Analytics

TRAINING

The bar chart shows the top 10 app categories in the Google Play Store based on the number of apps available in each category.
The pie chart shows the categories of apps in the Google Play Store, whether they are free or paid, based on the number of apps available in each type.
The histogram shows the distribution of app ratings in the Google Play Store.
The bar chart shows the sentiment distribution in the reviews.
The line chart shows the number of app updates over the years in the Google Play Store.
The scatter plot shows the relationship between last updated date and rating.
The box plot shows the distribution of ratings for each app type.

The area chart shows the Cumulative number of installs over time for each app category, with each category representing a seperate colour band in the chart. Here, 'Voyage et Local' = 'TRAVEL_AND_LOCAL' in French, 'Productividad' = 'PRODUCTIVITY' in Spanish, and '写真' = 'PHOTOGRAPHY' in Japanese.
The bubble plot shows the relationship between App Size and Rating. Here, 'सुंदरता' = 'BEAUTY' in Hindi, 'வணிகம்' = 'BUSINESS' in Tamil, 'DATUM' = 'DATING' in German. Filters include : Rating >= 3.5, Reviews >= 500, App name does not start with 'S', 'GAME' caategory must have a pink chart, Sentiment Polarity > 0.5, Installs > 50,000.
